subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy resplendent Beauty that shineth in the realm of glory, and by Thy manifest Light in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بجمالک المشعشع فی جبروت السنا و بنورک الظاهر فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
